prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3WATT-CREE-ZOOM-HEADLAMP Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Zoom 3 Watt Cree Head Lamp Pivots 180 Degrees 120 Lumens Head Strap Description: Let there be light at all times with the ASR Outdoor 3 Watt Zoom Head Lamp.

The ASR Outdoor Zoom Head Lamp is a great item to keep with your camping gear or emergency kit. Each head lamp features a 3 Watt Cree XPE bulb with 120 lumens. It also has a zoom function as well as a 3 stage switch, allowing you to use the light at full power, half power or strobe for different situations.

These head lamps swivel 180 degrees and have a rubberized plastic handle. The elastic head strap will allow for added comfort and hands-free use. It requires 3AAA batteries (included) and is great for biking, hiking, emergencies and more.

Make sure to keep one of these around the house, garage or among your outdoor gear. Search Terms: headlamp led hiking light safety camping outdoor caving orienteering skiing backpacking mountaineering Features: - 3 Watt Cree XPE Bulb - 120 Lumens - Zoom Focus Light - 3 Stage Switch: Full Power, Half Power & Strobe - Overall Dimensions: 2-5/16" x 1-3/4" x 3" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Zoom 3 Watt Cree Head Lamp

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3 Watt Zoom Cree LED Headlamp

anthropic.title_differentiation: 120 Lumens, Zoom Focus, 180 Degree Pivot, 3 Stage Switch, Hands-Free Use, Camping And Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: 120 Lumens, 180-Degree Pivot, 3-Stage Switch, Zoom Focus, 3AAA Batteries Included, Elastic Head Strap
